text:
We need the minimum number of coins to make 11 cents using 1, 5, and 10 cent coins.

- Using one 10-cent coin leaves 1 cent → use one 1-cent coin.  
  Total coins = 2.

- Using two 5-cent coins gives 10 cents, then need 1 more cent → 3 coins.  
- Using only 1-cent coins would be 11 coins.

The best is 2 coins.

Final integer: 2
